title: cuphea llavea var. miniata
intro: Cuphea llavea var. miniata, also known as Firecracker plant or Miniature Cuphea, is a flowering plant species in the Lythraceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cuphea llavea var. miniata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activities. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
